evidence.q1: Sections are numbered 1 through 15 sequentially with no internal cross-reference errors.
evidence.q2: 'Personal Data' means raw individual records..." defined once in Section 2 and used consistently throughout.
evidence.q3: 'within 2 business days' (Section 4) – specific, commercial time phrasing used throughout, no vague terms like 'reasonable while'.
evidence.q4: 'Vendor will maintain administrative, technical, and physical safeguards...' – modern business English, no archaic diction.
evidence.q5: 'Vendor will notify Customer within 48 hours after discovering a Personal Data Breach.' – grammatically correct and coherent.
evidence.q6: All clauses use consistent register: 'Vendor will...', 'Customer will...' with uniform commercial language.
